style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. Three broad steps rise from lower left to upper right. The first step is labelled LEVEL 1: PROMPTING with a small speech-bubble icon, the second LEVEL 2: AGENTS with a small gear-and-robot icon, the third LEVEL 3: APPLICATIONS with a small application-window icon. A thin rust arrow loops back from each higher step to the one before it, labelled REPEAT ANY LEVEL. A small tag to the side reads SELF-SERVE, ALWAYS AVAILABLE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: 'NIVEAU 1 : DIALOGUE PAR REQUÊTES', 'NIVEAU 2 : AGENTS', 'NIVEAU 3 : APPLICATIONS', 'REPRENDRE N'IMPORTE QUEL NIVEAU', 'LIBRE-SERVICE, TOUJOURS OFFERT'. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
